hook.name: AggHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that aggregates USDC.e/USDC swaps across 12 liquidity pools (11 v4 pools and 1 PancakeSwap v3 pool) by sorting routes by effective sqrtPrice and filling sequentially. It uses beforeSwapReturnsDelta to return the aggregated delta, levies a fee via poolManager.donate(), and restricts pool initialization and liquidity addition to a hardcoded admin address.
